case_title: MOHAMMED IRSHAD et al VS. DAVID T. PANG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IRSHAD, MOHAMMED HUSSEIN, NOREEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID T. MAREK, DANA $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY IRSHAD, MOHAMMED HUSSEIN, NOREEN AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID T. MAREK, DANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED OCT-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID T.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PANG, DAVID T. MAREK, DANA
